findings.description: Several property names from the attribute table are missing from hints: rel, rev, charset, type, name, shape, coords
findings.source_evidence: Table first column lists: charset, type, name, href, hreflang, rel, rev, shape, coords, target, secure. Only href, hreflang, secure, target are in hints.

findings.source_evidence: Table first column lists: src, alt, name, longdesc, height, width, usemap, ismap, align, border, hspace, vspace, secure. Only src, alt, secure, usemap are in hints.
